title: pelargonium × clarum
intro: Pelargonium × clarum, also known as Mountain Rose, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, a type of flowering plant native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains rosmarinic acid, a compound with antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × clarum include its potential to reduce symptoms of colds, flu, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to soothe sore throats and calm anxiety. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × clarum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infused oils, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
